personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Oracle, MySQL, SQL Performance & Database Operations

summary: Senior Data Engineer / Database Support Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience supporting high-volume transactional systems, Oracle and MySQL platforms, SQL performance tuning, data normalization, operational reporting, automation, runbooks, and production incident response. Strong hands-on background in Oracle RAC, MySQL-to-Oracle migration, PL/SQL, advanced SQL, C++/OCCI/OCI, Python, Korn Shell scripting, monitoring, performance remediation, validation routines, and mission-critical enterprise support. Experienced owning significant database and data platform components, improving operational readiness, and collaborating across engineering, operations, and security teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Designed Oracle schemas, historical retention structures, and reporting datasets supporting capacity analysis, seasonal forecasting, executive reporting, and operational decision-making.
Built SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue workflows to collect, normalize, validate, and analyze datasets across multiple data platforms.
Developed validation, reconciliation, balancing, and troubleshooting routines to improve accuracy, completeness, and reliability of recurring production datasets.
Tuned SQL queries, schema access patterns, and pipeline workflows for performance, scalability, and maintainability across recurring data processing workloads.
Created monitoring-oriented reporting and operational dashboards using enterprise telemetry from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and other production sources.
Improved runbooks, support documentation, and repeatable operational procedures for recurring reporting, troubleshooting, and production support workflows.
Contributed to production issue diagnosis by tracing data problems across source systems, transformations, reporting layers, and downstream operational outputs.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume described internally as 10x VISA scale.
Optimized C++ and OCCI transaction processing to reduce physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and protect business-critical data integrity.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and cutover support workflows during phased MySQL-to-Oracle platform migration.
Worked with high-volume relational data structures, Oracle RAC behavior, SQL access patterns, and production database performance considerations.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting monitoring, alerting, production visibility, and performance troubleshooting.
Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Supported production monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting continuity through a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 cutover with TLS 1.2 enforcement.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, client training materials, and knowledge-sharing content for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and support workflows.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and bottleneck findings used by engineering teams for production release decisions.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.
Supported production troubleshooting, QA cycles, and defect triage for mission-critical telecom billing processes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: High-Volume MySQL to Oracle RAC Migration
projects.description: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, built validation tooling, automated schema conversion, and optimized transaction processing for mission-critical workload reliability.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated forecasting datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.
